results.question: What variables measure maternal smoking during pregnancy?

## Relevant Variables

```
Table: BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey
Variable: ght_2howoftenifeversmoke
Label: How often did you use tobacco products before you were pregnant?
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 less than 1 a day] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 20 a day or more] [6 Do not wish to answer] [7 NT]
Non-missing records: 920
```

```
Table: BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey
Variable: ght_2eversmoke
Label: Did you ever smoke cigarettes or use tobacco before you were pregnant? 
	  Thi
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 No] [2 Yes] [3 Do not wish to answer] [4 NT]
Non-missing records: 2554
```

```
Table: BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey
Variable: smk03mthb4
Label: Number of cigarettes smoked in 3 months before pregnancy
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 None] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 Over 20 a day]
Non-missing records: 3026
```

```
Table: BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey
Variable: ght_1smokeinpreg
Label: Since finding out you were pregnant, how many times did you or do you use tobacc
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 none] [2 less than 1 a day] [3 1-5 a day] [4 6-10 a day] [5 11-20 a day] [6 20 a day or more] [7 Do not wish to answer]
Non-missing records: 2535
```

```
Table: BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey
Variable: smk0fr3mth
Label: Number of cigarettes smoked in first 3 months of pregnancy
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 None] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 Over 20 a day]
Non-missing records: 2961
```

```
Table: BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey
Variable: smk0smkprg
Label: Mother smoked during pregnancy (derived)
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 Yes] [2 No]
Non-missing records: 11374
```

```
Table: BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey
Variable: ght_2smokeinhouse
Label: Does anybody else smoke in your house (excluding e-cigarettes)?
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 No] [2 Yes] [3 Do not wish to answer] [4 NT]
Non-missing records: 2549
```

```
Table: BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey
Variable: smk04thmth
Label: Number of cigarettes smoked since 4th month of pregnancy
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 None] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 Over 20 a day]
Non-missing records: 2937
```

```
Table: BiB_1000.bib1000_36m_main
Variable: bib36e03
Label: If yes, number of cigs smoked since giving birth
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 None] [2 1-5 per day] [3 6-10 per day] [4 11-20 per day] [5 20+ per day] [6 Not applicable]
Non-missing records: 298
```

```
Table: BiB_1000.bib1000_24m_main
Variable: bib24h03
Label: If yes, number of cigs smoked since giving birth
Topic: smoking
Type: categorical
Categories/Values: [1 None] [2 1-5 per day] [3 6-10 per day] [4 11-20 per day] [5 20+ per day] [6 Not applicable]
Non-missing records: 271
```

results.answer_text:
To measure maternal smoking during pregnancy in the Born in Bradford (BiB) dataset, several variables are available across different tables. Here are the key variables:

### Baseline Survey (BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey)
| Variable | Table | Label | Type | Categories/Values | N (non-missing) |
|----------|-------|-------|------|-------------------|------------------|
| ght_2howoftenifeversmoke | BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey | How often did you use tobacco products before you were pregnant? | categorical | [1 less than 1 a day] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 20 a day or more] [6 Do not wish to answer] [7 NT] | 920 |
| ght_2eversmoke | BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey | Did you ever smoke cigarettes or use tobacco before you were pregnant? | categorical | [1 No] [2 Yes] [3 Do not wish to answer] [4 NT] | 2554 |
| ght_1smokeinpreg | BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey | Since finding out you were pregnant, how many times did you or do you use tobacco? | categorical | [1 none] [2 less than 1 a day] [3 1-5 a day] [4 6-10 a day] [5 11-20 a day] [6 20 a day or more] [7 Do not wish to answer] | 2535 |
| ght_2smokeinhouse | BiBBS_Baseline.pregnancy_survey | Does anybody else smoke in your house (excluding e-cigarettes)? | categorical | [1 No] [2 Yes] [3 Do not wish to answer] [4 NT] | 2549 |

### Baseline Main Survey (BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey)
| Variable | Table | Label | Type | Categories/Values | N (non-missing) |
|----------|-------|-------|------|-------------------|------------------|
| smk03mthb4 | BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey | Number of cigarettes smoked in 3 months before pregnancy | categorical | [1 None] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 Over 20 a day] | 3026 |
| smk0fr3mth | BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey | Number of cigarettes smoked in first 3 months of pregnancy | categorical | [1 None] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 Over 20 a day] | 2961 |
| smk0smkprg | BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey | Mother smoked during pregnancy (derived) | categorical | [1 Yes] [2 No] | 11374 |
| smk04thmth | BiB_Baseline.base_m_survey | Number of cigarettes smoked since 4th month of pregnancy | categorical | [1 None] [2 1-5 a day] [3 6-10 a day] [4 11-20 a day] [5 Over 20 a day] | 2937 |

### Postnatal Surveys (BiB_1000)
| Variable | Table | Label | Type | Categories/Values | N (non-missing) |
|----------|-------|-------|------|-------------------|------------------|
| bib36e03 | BiB_1000.bib1000_36m_main | If yes, number of cigs smoked since giving birth | categorical | [1 None] [2 1-5 per day] [3 6-10 per day] [4 11-20 per day] [5 20+ per day] [6 Not applicable] | 298 |
| bib
